mapper.select: select his.SERVICE_NO, his.CONTRACT_NO, his.REQ_DT, part.COMP_CD, dept.DEPT_NM, cont.DEPT_CD, org.company_cd, org.company_nm, (select POINT_SUM from ts_work_survey where SERVICE_NO = his.SERVICE_NO) survey_sum, part.REGULAR_SERVICE_CD, code1.CODE_TEXT, his.SERVICE_CD, code2.CODE_TEXT from ts_work_history his left join ts_work_sw_partner part on part.SUB_CD = his.SUB_CD left join tc_dept dept on dept.DEPT_CD = part.COMP_CD left join ts_work_sw_contract cont on cont.CONTRACT_NO = his.CONTRACT_NO left join v_organization_structure org on org.origin_cd = cont.DEPT_CD left join tc_common_code code1 on code1.CODE_CD = part.REGULAR_SERVICE_CD left join tc_common_code code2 on code2.CODE_CD = his.SERVICE_CD where part.COMP_CD = #{dto.partnerCode} and org.company_cd like concat('%', #{dto.customerCode}, '%') and year(his.REQ_DT) = #{dto.searchYear} and month(his.REQ_DT) between #{dto.startDate} and #{dto.endDate}

SELECT org.company_cd, org.company_nm, SUM( CASE part.REGULAR_SERVICE_CD WHEN 'SERVICE_ITEM_CUSTOM' THEN ((12+1)-7) WHEN 'REGULAR_SERVICE_QUARTER' THEN ((12+1)-7) / 3 WHEN 'REGULAR_SERVICE_HALF' THEN ((12+1)-7) / 6 WHEN 'REGULAR_SERVICE_YEAR' THEN ((12+1)-7) / 12 ELSE 0 END ) AS TOTAL_REGULAR_PLAN_CNT FROM ts_work_sw_contract cont JOIN ts_work_sw_partner part ON part.sub_cd = cont.sub_cd LEFT JOIN v_organization_structure org ON org.origin_cd = cont.DEPT_CD WHERE cont.CONTRACT_YEAR = #{searchYear} AND MONTH(cont.CONTRACT_ST_DT) >= 7 AND MONTH(cont.CONTRACT_ED_DT) <= 12 GROUP BY org.company_cd, org.company_nm ORDER BY org.company_cd
select DISTINCT a.company_nm, a.company_cd from v_organization_structure a WHERE a.dept_type_cd = 'C' and a.comp_type_cd = 'C' ORDER BY a.company_cd
